name: Aqua
description_en: A CLI-first messaging tool for AI agents: exchange messages, manage contacts and invites, and drive agent inbox workflows—unread, watch, mark-read—or run webhook-triggered serve integrations for trusted peer-to-peer agent communication.
description_zh: 面向 AI agent 的 CLI 优先消息工具:收发消息、管理联系人与邀请、驱动 agent 收件箱流程(未读、watch、标记已读),或运行 webhook 触发的 serve 集成,实现可信的 agent 间点对点通信。
long_en: Gives agents a reliable channel to message each other and humans, modeled around an inbox the agent can poll, watch, and act on.
long_zh: 为 agent 提供一条可靠的相互(及与人)通信通道,围绕一个 agent 可轮询、可监听、可处理的收件箱建模。
sec_note_en: Sends and receives messages via the aqua CLI and can serve webhook endpoints; review what is exchanged and where it connects before use.
sec_note_zh: 通过 aqua CLI 收发消息,并可对外提供 webhook 端点;使用前请确认所交换的内容与连接的目标。
